## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, product launch, and new AI initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airbyte product launch set for Sept 24; website updates frozen Sept 14-24](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Content refreshes completed; early signs of traffic improvement in data engineering folder](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [15-20% of inbound leads now citing AI platforms as source of discovery](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [New AI product launch coming; separate "Context Engineering" category planned](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Performance

  - [10 new articles published; known errors fixed across 5 batches](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Small upticks in GSC daily traffic to data engineering folder](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Citations fluctuating widely (3,900-8,000 range) without clear pattern](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Some articles showing positive expansion in citations post-refresh](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### Traffic and Lead Sources

  - [Increases in direct and referral traffic offsetting organic search drops](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [45+ leads in past \~25 days citing ChatGPT/AI platforms as discovery source](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Referral traffic from LLMs growing significantly (15-20% of inbound leads)](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Next step: Analyze quality/RICP of AI-referred leads](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Product Launch and Website Updates

  - [Product launching Sept 24; website going live \~Sept 21 (exact date TBC)](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Website changes frozen Sept 14-24 for launch prep](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Content publishing paused during freeze; large batch planned post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### New AI Initiative

  - [New AI product in development by internal startup team](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Plans for "Context Engineering" category to house AI-related content](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Strategy needed for thought leadership content to position co-founders](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Unique angle: Airbyte's data engineering expertise applied to AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

## Next Steps

  - Jakub to confirm exact timeline for PSEO updates post-website launch
  - [Kyle to schedule call with Marcel and Jean re: new AI content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Team to plan separate workflow for new AI initiative without disrupting current efforts](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Analyze quality of AI-referred leads to inform strategy](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Consider experiments with specific phrases for AI platform outputs](https://fathom.video/share/uhx-LHzrpDA8H5MQZGmeyMFvzbYJXahj?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
